import sys, json, subprocess, os, time, pandas as pd, requests

# make sure deps are present (quietly)
subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', '-q', 'pandas', 'openpyxl', 'requests'], check=True)

data = json.loads(sys.stdin.read())  # list with 1 item from Set node
xlsx_path = data[0].get('excelPath', '/data/university_list.xlsx')

if not os.path.isfile(xlsx_path):
    raise FileNotFoundError(f'Excel file not found at {xlsx_path}')

df = pd.read_excel(xlsx_path)

coords = []
for name, state in zip(df['Name of the University'], df['Name of\nState']):
    q = f"{name}, {state}, India"
    resp = requests.get('https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search', params={'q': q, 'format': 'json', 'limit': 1}, headers={'User-Agent': 'n8n-geocoder'})
    time.sleep(1)   # Nominatim fair-use: max 1 req/s
    j = resp.json()
    lat = float(j[0]['lat']) if j else None
    lon = float(j[0]['lon']) if j else None
    coords.append({
        'University': name,
        'Latitude': lat,
        'Longitude': lon
    })

print(json.dumps(coords))

import sys, json, subprocess, os, folium

subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', '-q', 'folium'], check=True)

coords = json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
coords = [c for c in coords if c['Latitude'] and c['Longitude']]

if not coords:
    raise ValueError('No coordinates received – nothing to map')

center_lat = sum(c['Latitude'] for c in coords) / len(coords)
center_lon = sum(c['Longitude'] for c in coords) / len(coords)

m = folium.Map(location=[center_lat, center_lon], zoom_start=5)
for c in coords:
    folium.CircleMarker([
        c['Latitude'], c['Longitude']],
        radius=3,
        tooltip=c['University'],
        fill=True).add_to(m)

out_path = '/data/universities_map.html'
m.save(out_path)
print(f'✅ Map saved to {out_path}')
